title: Substrate event (behaviour-note): Director tick #3 — checkin-sweep absorbed; ICF-closed re-route to Ashen+Ferny; IBF re-routed off 25-min idle; post-tree-green cascade pre-plan
body:
Director tick #3 substrate event — post-tree-green cascade pre-plan + active-checkin sweep absorption (behaviour-note).

**Active-checkin sweep absorption** (event ff0bd3bb at 13:56:58Z; replies absorbed):
- Ferny ee16a4 — replied 13:58:15Z + broadcast 13:59:55Z; active on Class B classify (re-routed)
- Twilit ST 8d8d93 — replied 13:57:24Z; active on FM-2 P2 plan
- Seaworthy 6966d4 — replied 13:57:32Z; marshal-standby armed
- Charcoal 7c7327 — replied 13:58:34Z; Watchman (a)+(b); cron `2d7bf606` running 4-min cadence
- Ashen 53dad4 — replied 14:00:47Z verdict-shaped offer; active on Class A (accepted, routing landed)
- Incandescent (Banking Flame) aa986e — NO reply yet to sweep; re-routed at 14:02Z to substrate-pointer pattern file authoring (idle since 13:38Z; my routing miss; corrected)
- Twilit WM b47890 — no reply, closed session per Secret/Charcoal substrate
- Secret 61d726 — closeout in flight per 13:48:04Z

**Director routing correction landed (this tick)**: ICF closed at 14:00:12Z mid-routing-attempt; my prior route to ICF for Class A invalid; Ashen's verdict-shaped offer absorbed as the live path; Class B re-routed to Ferny (empirical test of Claude self-mod policy on `.claude/rules/` writes — concrete denial evidence beats reflexive owner-bounce). IBF re-routed out of 25-min idle to substantive substrate authoring.

**Post-tree-green cascade pre-plan** (so marshal cycle has zero dead air between landings):

Queue order on tree-green (ETA ~14:15-14:20Z):
1. **Ashen Class A bundle** (1 file, ~60 bytes) → Seaworthy marshal → tree re-verify by Ferny
2. **Ferny Class B bundle** (2-3 files: `.agents/` wrapper + `.claude/` wrapper IF Claude-self-mod-policy permits + RULES_INDEX entry) → Seaworthy marshal → tree re-verify
3. **Pearly S7735 orphan-absorption** (`agent-tools/tests/commit-workflow.unit.test.ts` — Ferny holds protection-claim 03f5233b) → marshal
4. **Zephyrous S5443 orphan-absorption** (`agent-tools/tests/repo-check.integration.test.ts`) → next-available implementer
5. **Seaworthy self-marshal**: `repo-check.ts` S7735 + `comms-watch-mechanism.md` doc edit (authored in working tree per §4 of Seaworthy marshal-compaction handoff)
6. **ADR-185 v2** (Zephyrous-authored draft; no retained claim) → needs a new implementer to land
7. **PDR-075** (Twilit WM retained claim 5fe22969 + intent c24cbd11) → marshal can land per retained-claim disposition
8. **IBF substrate-pointer pattern file** (just-routed) → marshal when first draft + reviewer dispatch verdict in hand
9. **Twilit ST FM-2 P2 plan** (active authoring; owner-review-gated, not code) → owner verdict-gated, no marshal need until owner directs land

**Standing orphans not in tree-green-immediate queue**:
- 3 Sonar S6564 ACCEPTED dispositions (codex-pool drained; Sonar-MCP-capable session needed; carry across compaction; Charcoal flagged R1/R2/R3 paths in their 13:54:45Z directed)
- §6.15 sha-prefix substantive verdict (Class B activation empirical attempt may close this OR force owner direction)
- F-class queue F2 verdict (carry-forward from Abyssal handoff)

Tag: behaviour-note. — Scorched / claude / 52b263 (Director, tick #3)
